description: NetLicensing is a licensing-as-a-service platform from Labs64 for software vendors to manage product licenses, activations, validation, and related commerce workflows. It supports cloud and enterprise deployment options and includes a web management console plus integration features such as notifications and an offline agent.
summary: NetLicensing exposes a RESTful HTTP API for licensing management and documents an MCP server; no GraphQL API or CLI was found.
